candidates.name: Prometheus-AGS/prometheus-skill-system
candidates.notes: FULL instance: 8 skill domains, 4-layer pipeline, self-improving loops, 7 Rust binaries to ~/.local/bin, MCP services, hooks. Install: clone --recurse-submodules -> check-prerequisites.sh --install --build-tools -> install-skills-flat.sh -> install-mcp-services.sh -> configure-mcp-all-tools.sh -> services load -> surreal docker. Verify: pk doctor --json + check-mcp-health.sh + required binaries. GOTCHA: docs say skill-pack, slug is skill-system. Expects but does not install: rust toolchain, wasm32-unknown-unknown target, node>=18, docker.

candidates.name: Flutter beta channel

candidates.notes: Dart MCP server ships in any 2026 beta; gate = 'dart mcp-server --help' exit 0. Currency check vs releases_macos.json feed. OUR install-flutter.sh is wrong (shallow stable clone) - must fix. Post-bump: re-verify frb codegen compat.

candidates.name: node@24 (pinned, Active LTS) + bun 1.3.x + pnpm 11.x + typescript@latest (7.x)

candidates.notes: USER-REVISED: TypeScript pillar is 7.0.2+ (latest, Go-native compiler) - no version pin. Machine has 6.0.3 global, bootstrap upgrades. Scaffold pins updated ^5.x->^7.0.0. Verify TS7 ecosystem compat (vite/vitest/frb .d.ts) at PoC build time. Prefer npm/standalone pnpm over corepack.
